USER_REGISTERED: Your registration is complete! Check your email for a confirmation link. If you don't find it immediately, check your spam folder.
START_TIME_MUST_BE_IN_THE_FUTURE: Start time must be in the future
PARTY_REQUIRES_TEAM_MODE: Your party can only queue team modes. Pick a mode that supports team play.

auth.OAUTH_ACCOUNT: This account was registered with Google. Please use the Google login method.

NOT_CUSTOM_GAME: Only custom games can be started before the lobby is full.
NOT_GAME_CREATOR: Only the player who created the game can start it early.
MISSING_TEAM_PLAYERS: At least one player must have joined on each team before you can start.
ERROR_STARTING_GAME: Something went wrong while starting the game. Please try again.
ORDERS_ALREADY_SUBMITTED: Orders already received for this turn.
ORDERS_STALE_TURN: The turn has already advanced. Please sync the game.
ORDERS_NOT_ACCEPTED: Orders could not be submitted. Please try again.
ERROR_SUBMITTING_ORDERS: Something went wrong while submitting orders. Please try again.
LIMITED_MODE_BUSY: Another player is creating a game right now. Try again in a moment.
